utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Apparently , there is like a million guys out there that can play Mac , and there is only this one robot and this one guy who controls it !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I did not know he could get me fired !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: What am I going to do ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well you know Joey , you are a pretty charming guy .

utterances.text: Thanks , but I kinda have a problem to deal with here .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No sweetie , you have got to win over the guy that controls C . H . E . E . S . E . ! You have got to kiss some serious robot ass !

utterances.text: Okay , but if I got to turn on the charm tomorrow I am not wasting anymore of it over here with you guys .
